goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: Attempt 1 reveals a product contract defect: the summary route returns dashboard.products/locations while ShoppingListEditor reads top-level fields, yielding empty intake options. Attempt 2 is a planner hydration race: the server-rendered generation button is enabled before its client handler attaches, so the click is lost. Repair both with focused regressions and exact response/render boundaries.

worker_package.objective: Fix nested summary parsing and disabled-until-mounted generation, add focused regressions, update exact E2E readiness, then complete build/browser/axe/screenshots/disposable DB/diff verification.
stop_if: Response/render boundary fails or scope broadens.
Two browser runs fail or ownership fails.

evidence: Summary route returns nested dashboard while ShoppingListEditor reads top-level arrays.
Persisted Basement shelf exists but intake options are empty.
Pre-hydration Make shortage list click produced no list, item, link, or error despite valid demand.

parallel_safety.rationale: Coupled response/render contracts share one workflow/mirror/port/database.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 queued until all evidence passes.
